nodes.label: Mandatory vs Configurable Addons design pattern
nodes.rationale: Four addons always run (composer_allow_plugins, composer_patches, composer_diff, update_hooks); configurable addons are data-driven from .drupdater.yaml, separating policy from mechanism. This prevents accidental omission of critical housekeeping while giving users control over optional steps.
nodes.norm_label: mandatory vs configurable addons design pattern

nodes.label: Security-only mode design
nodes.rationale: composer_audit is additionally mandatory in security mode; addons.security defaults to empty so nothing extra (code style, deprecation removal) interferes with the targeted security fix.
